skills.name: gamearena-player
skills.description: Play Rock-Paper-Scissors vs MARKOV off-chain (challenge-ai, auto 2 G$ refills) or on-chain G$ wagers when the keeper is live.

skills.name: actionorder-player
skills.description: Play ACTION-ORDER, an on-chain card fighting game on Celo, against the house AI. Pick a character, build a 5-card order each round, and win best-of-5 matches to earn points. Free vs-house mode, no wager.
